C

com.github.juanfranciscofernandezherreros.library.openapi.autoconfigure - package com.github.juanfranciscofernandezherreros.library.openapi.autoconfigure
 
com.github.juanfranciscofernandezherreros.library.openapi.generator - package com.github.juanfranciscofernandezherreros.library.openapi.generator
 
ControllerGenerator - Class in com.github.juanfranciscofernandezherreros.library.openapi.generator
Generates a Spring MVC @RestController stub class from a group of OpenAPI operations that share the same tag.
ControllerGenerator() - Constructor for class com.github.juanfranciscofernandezherreros.library.openapi.generator.ControllerGenerator
 

D

DtoGenerator - Class in com.github.juanfranciscofernandezherreros.library.openapi.generator
Generates a Lombok-annotated Java DTO class from an OpenAPI object schema.
DtoGenerator() - Constructor for class com.github.juanfranciscofernandezherreros.library.openapi.generator.DtoGenerator
 

G

generate() - Method in class com.github.juanfranciscofernandezherreros.library.openapi.generator.OpenApiGeneratorService
Runs the full generation pipeline.
generate(String, Schema, String) - Method in class com.github.juanfranciscofernandezherreros.library.openapi.generator.DtoGenerator
Generates the Java source of a DTO class for the given OpenAPI schema.
generate(String, List<OperationEntry>, String) - Method in class com.github.juanfranciscofernandezherreros.library.openapi.generator.ControllerGenerator
Generates a @RestController stub class source for the given tag and operations.

J

JavaTypeResolver - Class in com.github.juanfranciscofernandezherreros.library.openapi.generator
Converts an OpenAPI Schema into the corresponding Java type name string.
JavaTypeResolver() - Constructor for class com.github.juanfranciscofernandezherreros.library.openapi.generator.JavaTypeResolver
 

O

OpenApiAutoConfiguration - Class in com.github.juanfranciscofernandezherreros.library.openapi.autoconfigure
Auto-configuration for the OpenAPI code-generation starter.
OpenApiAutoConfiguration() - Constructor for class com.github.juanfranciscofernandezherreros.library.openapi.autoconfigure.OpenApiAutoConfiguration
 
openApiGenerationRunner(OpenApiGeneratorService) - Method in class com.github.juanfranciscofernandezherreros.library.openapi.autoconfigure.OpenApiAutoConfiguration
 
openApiGeneratorService(OpenApiProperties) - Method in class com.github.juanfranciscofernandezherreros.library.openapi.autoconfigure.OpenApiAutoConfiguration
 
OpenApiGeneratorService - Class in com.github.juanfranciscofernandezherreros.library.openapi.generator
Orchestrates OpenAPI code generation: parses the spec and delegates to DtoGenerator (schemas) and ControllerGenerator (paths), writing every generated file to the configured output directory.
OpenApiGeneratorService(OpenApiProperties) - Constructor for class com.github.juanfranciscofernandezherreros.library.openapi.generator.OpenApiGeneratorService
 
OpenApiProperties - Class in com.github.juanfranciscofernandezherreros.library.openapi.autoconfigure
Configuration properties for the OpenAPI code-generation starter.
OpenApiProperties() - Constructor for class com.github.juanfranciscofernandezherreros.library.openapi.autoconfigure.OpenApiProperties
 
OperationEntry - Class in com.github.juanfranciscofernandezherreros.library.openapi.generator
Carries metadata for a single OpenAPI operation together with its HTTP method and path.
OperationEntry(String, String, Operation) - Constructor for class com.github.juanfranciscofernandezherreros.library.openapi.generator.OperationEntry
 

R

requiresListImport(Schema) - Method in class com.github.juanfranciscofernandezherreros.library.openapi.generator.JavaTypeResolver
Returns true if the resolved type requires a java.util.List import.
resolve(Schema) - Method in class com.github.juanfranciscofernandezherreros.library.openapi.generator.JavaTypeResolver
Resolves the Java type name for the given OpenAPI schema.
